series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, documents related to, created for use at, or created or gathered at regular, special and emergency meetings of the Commission, for example, agenda, minutes, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for two years, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction. Once converted into verified machine-related format, if at all, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for two years, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
